items.title: Casino now supports MN2 and PayPal USD
items.summary: Stake with virtual coins, MN2 wallet balance, or PayPal-funded USD play balance. Deposit USD via PayPal, then switch currency in the casino.

items.title: New slot machines in the casino
items.summary: Classic Reels and Diamond Rush slots are live — spin for multi-symbol payouts on coins, MN2, or USD.

items.title: Shop booster packs and game time bundles
items.summary: New booster packs, extended game time SKUs, and exclusive bonus items are available in the shop.

items.title: Account security for real-money balances
items.summary: Enable password-on-login and real-money protection on your profile when you hold MN2 or casino USD balance.

items.title: Profile & Points sync
items.summary: Profile and Points are fully connected: use Refresh points on Profile and View full profile on Points.

items.title: Star Map 25
items.summary: Investigate 25 WH40K-themed systems, earn game points, and unlock trophies.
